_comment: Reference for configuring the GRIZL Genie space in the Databricks UI (AI/BI → Genie → New space). Genie space creation is UI-only; this file documents the intended configuration. Equivalent to Fabric Data Agent settings.
title: grizl-observability
description: GRIZL incident evidence assistant over observability Delta tables in Unity Catalog. Answers natural language questions about application errors, HTTP request patterns, deployment regressions, and forwarder health.

tables.description: Source-of-truth GRIZL log events — backend HTTP requests, application errors, frontend telemetry, deployments, and forwarder health.
HTTP request events from grizl-backend. Use for route-level error and latency analysis.
ERROR and CRITICAL severity events across all services. Use for error signature analysis and incident investigation.
Browser telemetry from grizl-frontend. Use for page-level error analysis.
Deployment metadata events. Use for correlating errors with specific deployment SHAs.
grizl-log-forwarder operational events. Use for diagnosing log pipeline health.
Active anomaly signals from all z-score detection views. Use for current incident context.

example_questions: What are the most common errors on grizl-backend in the last hour?
Show me the error rate for /api/memes over the last 24 hours
Which deployment SHA has the most post-deploy errors?
Is the grizl-log-forwarder healthy? When was the last batch_sent event?
What error signatures are currently spiking?
Show me the top 5 slowest routes by p95 latency today
Are there any active anomaly signals in the last 15 minutes?
